message:
Add useFilterState hook unit tests (33 tests)

Tests cover:
- Initialization from URL query params
- setQuery with encoding and preservation of other params
- setCategory setting and removal
- setTags with comma-separated values
- toggleTag adding and removing tags
- clearFilters removing all params
- hasActiveFilters computed property
- URL pathname handling
- Edge cases (empty strings, special characters)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
